scripts.lint: oxlint apps packages e2e playwright.config.ts playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix apps packages e2e playwright.config.ts playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.format: oxfmt apps packages e2e package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json playwright.config.ts playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check apps packages e2e package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json playwright.config.ts playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.test:design:browser: playwright test e2e/auth-login.spec.ts --grep 'loads the active profile|redirects an anonymous root request|alternative visual profile|input focus visible|dark-mode authentication accessible'
scripts.test:design:browser:production: PLAYWRIGHT_USE_PRODUCTION_BUILD=1 PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=8094 playwright test e2e/auth-login.spec.ts --grep 'loads the active profile|redirects an anonymous root request|alternative visual profile|input focus visible|dark-mode authentication accessible'
scripts.verify:release: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:design:hard && pnpm build && pnpm test:design:browser:production
